name: Doubao TTS
description:
## Usage

1. **Get an API Key**: create and copy an API Key from the [API Key page](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/new/setting/apikeys).
2. **Choose a voice**: pick a voice in the [Voice Library](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/new/voices), then copy its voice ID, for example `zh_female_tianmei`.
3. **Configure the plugin**: paste the API Key in Omni Code, choose a model version, and enter the voice ID.

zh.description:
## 使用流程

1. **获取 API Key**：在[API Key 管理页面](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/new/setting/apikeys)创建并复制 API Key。
2. **选择音色**：在[音色库](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/new/voices)选择合适的音色，复制音色 ID（如 `zh_female_tianmei`）。
3. **配置插件**：在 Omni Code 中粘贴 API Key，选择模型版本并填写音色 ID。

setting_fields.label: Model
setting_fields.help: Choose the model version. This is sent as X-Api-Resource-Id.

zh.help: 选择模型版本，对应 X-Api-Resource-Id。

setting_fields.label: Speaker
setting_fields.help: Voice ID from Console > Voice Library.

zh.help: 音色 ID，从控制台 > 音色库获取。
